tasks.title: Review the publish bundle
tasks.body: Review the assembled blog post and hero-image bundle before it goes to WordPress. An organization approver signs off; a rejection sends the bundle back for revision and nothing behind this gate proceeds until a human resolves it.

acceptance.description: The post draft and hero image are complete, on-brand, and ready to publish.

tasks.title: Create the WordPress draft
tasks.body: Create the WordPress draft from the approved bundle. The dispatched worker agent receives this item's title and body as its brief; the post, project, and WordPress-instance context rides the project instance.

tasks.title: Publish in the WordPress admin
tasks.body: Review the created draft in the WordPress admin and publish it. Checkpoint - a human marks this done.

tasks.title: Notify that the publish is complete
tasks.body: Confirm the post is live and notify the team that publication is complete. Checkpoint - a human marks this done.
